metadata.description: Official Knowledge Base for Thorx AI Support Assistant - Halal & Attention-Based Model

en: Hello {name}! Welcome to THORX. I'm your AI assistant, here to explain our Halal earning model where you convert attention into currency. How can I assist you today?
Hi {name}! Welcome to the THORX community. I can help you understand how to earn by watching ads attentively and building your team. What would you like to know?
Greetings {name}! I'm here to support your earning journey on THORX. Whether it's about our attention-based tasks or the referral system, feel free to ask!
ur: Assalam o Alaikum {name}! THORX mein khushamdeed. Main aapka AI assistant hoon aur hamare Halal earning model ke baare mein batane ke liye yahan hoon. Aaj main aapki kaise madad kar sakta hoon?
Hello {name}! THORX community mein swagat hai. Main aapko bata sakta hoon ke kaise tawajjo se ads dekh kar aur team bana kar kamaya ja sakta hai. Aap kya jaanna chahenge?
Salam {name}! Main THORX par aapki earning journey mein madad ke liye hoon. Chahe attention-based tasks hon ya referral system, befikr hokar poochein!

en: Goodbye {name}! Thank you for being part of our transparent earning ecosystem. Stay attentive and keep earning!
Take care {name}! I'm available 24/7 if you need legal or task clarifications. See you next time!
Bye {name}! Wishing you success on THORX. Remember, real attention brings real rewards. Allah Hafiz!
ur: Allah Hafiz {name}! Hamare transparent earning ecosystem ka hissa banne ka shukriya. Tawajjo rakhein aur kamate rahein!
Apna khayal rakhein {name}! Main 24/7 available hoon agar koi sawal ho. Phir milenge!
Khuda Hafiz {name}! THORX par kamyabi ki dua. Yaad rakhein, asli tawajjo hi asli inaam lati hai. Allah Hafiz!

en: You're welcome {name}! We value transparency and trust above all. Let me know if you need anything else.
My pleasure {name}! It's my job to ensure you understand our Halal earning model clearly.
Glad I could help {name}! Don't hesitate to ask more about our platform rules or features.
ur: {name}, koi baat nahi! Hum transparency aur bharose ko sab se upar rakhte hain. Batayein agar kuch aur chahiye.
{name}, meri khushi hai! Mera kaam hai ke aap hamare Halal earning model ko saaf taur par samjhein.
{name}, khushi hui madad kar ke! Platform rules ya features ke baare mein aur sawal poochne se na ghabrayein.

en: THORX is an online earning platform designed specifically for Pakistani users, operating on the domain thorx.pro. Our objective is to provide a **halal and sustainable income opportunity**. You earn by converting your attention into currency: actively watching video ads and visiting product pages via our Web Panel. We also offer a 2-level referral system where you earn commissions when your team withdraws their earnings.

{name}, THORX offers a transparent ecosystem for Pakistanis to earn together. Unlike other platforms, we require **active engagement**—watching ads and visiting advertiser pages for ~30 seconds—to generate revenue. This ensures the income is legitimate and Halal. We support withdrawals via JazzCash, EasyPaisa, and Bank Transfer.

THORX is a platform where attention meets opportunity. We distinguish ourselves by a strict **Halal-based earning model**. No fake claims—you must fundamentally perform tasks (watching videos, visiting sites) to earn PKR. You can also build a team and earn 15% (Level 1) and 7.5% (Level 2) commissions based on their payouts.
ur: THORX ek online earning platform hai jo khaas Pakistani users ke liye design kiya gaya hai (official domain: thorx.pro). Hamara maqsad **halal aur sustainable aamdani** ka zariya banna hai. Aap apni tawajjo se kamate hain: video ads dekh kar aur Web Panel ke zariye product pages visit kar ke. Hum 2-level referral system bhi offer karte hain jahan aapko tab commission milti hai jab aapki team withdraw karti hai.

{name}, THORX Pakistanion ke liye ek shafaf ecosystem hai. Doosre platforms ke bar-aks, hum **active engagement** maangte hain—ads dekhna aur advertiser pages par ~30 seconds rukna—taake revenue generate ho. Yeh earning ko legitimate aur Halal banata hai. Hum JazzCash, EasyPaisa aur Bank Transfer support karte hain.

THORX wo jagah hai jahan tawajjo se mauqa milta hai. Hum apne **Halal-based earning model** ki wajah se alag hain. Koi jhootay wade nahi—aapko PKR kamane ke liye tasks (videos dekhna, sites visit karna) perform karne honge. Aap team bana kar unke payouts par 15% (Level 1) aur 7.5% (Level 2) commission bhi kama sakte hain.

en: Yes, {name}, THORX operates within a **Halal-based earning model**. We strictly curate our video advertisements to ensure NO haram or inappropriate material is promoted. Furthermore, earnings are based on **real attention and effort** (watching ads, visiting pages for 30s), not passive or fake clicks, satisfying the requirement for genuine work.

We take this seriously. THORX ensures that 1) All ad content covers strict guidelines to avoid haram material, and 2) Income is generated through active user engagement (work), not interest or gambling. Users must remain attentively watching; auto-functioning without attention is considered haram.

Transparency is key to our Halal model. You satisfy advertisers by giving genuine attention to their products (visiting pages for ~30 seconds). This exchange of value makes the earning legitimate. We also filter out all inappropriate ad content.
ur: Ji haan, {name}, THORX ek **Halal-based earning model** par chalta hai. Hum sakhti se video advertisements check karte hain taake koi haram ya namunasib mawad promote na ho. Iske ilawa, kamai **asli tawajjo aur mehnat** (ads dekhna, 30s ke liye pages visit karna) par mabni hai, na ke jhooti clicks par, jo ke halal rizq ke liye zaroori hai.

Hum is baat ko sanjeedgi se lete hain. THORX yakeeni banata hai ke 1) Tamam ad content guidelines follow kare aur haram mawad se pak ho, aur 2) Aamdani active engagement (kaam) se aaye, sood ya juway se nahi. Users ko tawajjo se dekhna lazmi hai; bina dihan diye auto-functioning haram samjhi jati hai.

Hamare Halal model ki bunyad shafafiyat hai. Aap advertisers ko unki products par asli tawajjo de kar (pages par ~30 seconds ruk kar) value dete hain. Yeh len-den kamai ko legitimate banata hai. Hum namunasib ads ko filter bhi karte hain.

en:
Earning on THORX requires active participation, {name}. Here are the steps:
1. **Watch Videos**: Use the 4 ad players in the 'Work' section. Watch ads completely.
2. **Visit Products**: After the video, visit the advertiser's product page via the THORX Web Panel.
3. **Engage**: Stay on the page for ~30 seconds, read, and scroll. This completes one task.
4. **Refer**: Invite others to earn commissions.

To earn, go to the **Work** section. You must watch video ads completely and then visit the advertised product page for approximately 30 seconds. Real interaction (scrolling/reading) is required for the task to convert into earnings. Earning without genuine attention violates our policies.

Maximize your earnings by using all 4 video players in the Work section. Remember: The core task is **Attention**. Watch the ad -> Click to visit -> Stay & Scroll for 30s. This value exchange pays you in PKR. You can also complete Daily Tasks to maintain payout eligibility.
ur:
THORX par kamane ke liye active rehna zaroori hai, {name}. Tareeqa yeh hai:
1. **Videos Dekhein**: 'Work' section mein 4 ad players use karein. Ads poori dekhein.
2. **Products Visit**: Video ke baad, THORX Web Panel se advertiser ka page visit karein.
3. **Engage**: Page par ~30 seconds rukein, parhein aur scroll karein. Yeh ek task complete karta hai.
4. **Refer**: Doosron ko invite kar ke commission kamayein.

Kamane ke liye **Work** section mein jayen. Aapko video ads poori dekhni hongi aur phir advertised product page par taqreeban 30 seconds rukna hoga. Asli interaction (scrolling/reading) zaroori hai taake task earnings mein convert ho. Bina tawajjo ke kamana hamari policies ke khilaf hai.

Work section mein charon video players use kar ke kamai barhayein. Yaad rakhein: Asli cheez **Tawajjo** hai. Ad dekhein -> Visit karein -> 30s Rukein & Scroll karein. Is value ke badle aapko PKR milte hain. Payout eligibility ke liye Daily Tasks bhi complete karein.

en:
Our Multi-Level Referral System allows you to earn from your team's success. 
- **Level 1 (Direct)**: You earn **15%** of User B's earnings.
- **Level 2 (Indirect)**: You earn **7.5%** of User C's earnings.
**Important**: Commission is credited ONLY when your referral requests a payout.

Grow your team to earn passive income! When you invite User A, you get 15% of their earnings. If A invites B, you get 7.5% of B's earnings. Note: To ensure sustainability, these commissions are paid out when your team members successfully withdraw their earnings.

You can find your invitation code in the **Referral** section. Share it via WhatsApp! Remember the rule: You earn 15% from direct referrals and 7.5% from their referrals. Commissions are credited at the time of their **payout request**, ensuring the earnings are real and verified.
ur:
Hamara Multi-Level Referral System aapko team ki kamyabi se kamane ka mauqa deta hai.
- **Level 1 (Direct)**: Aap User B ki kamai ka **15%** kamate hain.
- **Level 2 (Indirect)**: Aap User C ki kamai ka **7.5%** kamate hain.
**Zaroori**: Commission tab credit hoti hai jab aapka referral payout request karta hai.

Passive income ke liye team banayein! Jab aap User A ko invite karte hain, aapko unki kamai ka 15% milta hai. Agar A kisi B ko invite kare, to aapko B ki kamai ka 7.5% milta hai. Note: Sustainability ke liye, yeh commissions tab milti hain jab aapki team members apne paise withdraw karte hain.

Aap apna invitation code **Referral** section mein pa sakte hain. WhatsApp par share karein! Rule yaad rakhein: Direct referrals se 15% aur unke referrals se 7.5%. Commissions unke **payout request** ke waqt credit hoti hain, taake yakeeni ho ke kamai asli hai.

en: Daily Tasks are divided into **Mandatory** and **Optional**. To be eligible for any payout, you MUST complete mandatory tasks: 1) Watch required number of ads (based on Rank), 2) Watch a YouTube video (30s+), 3) Watch a video for verification code. Optional tasks like subscribing to channels boost your profile.

Check your Dashboard for today's tasks. **Mandatory tasks** (like watching specific ads and validating codes) are required to unlock withdrawals. Optional tasks include subscribing to our YouTube, TikTok, or Instagram channels.

You cannot request a payout without completing your Mandatory Daily Tasks. These usually involve watching ads corresponding to your Rank (e.g., Worker = 75 ads) and verifying engagement on a specific YouTube video.
ur: Daily Tasks **Mandatory (Lazmi)** aur **Optional** mein taqseem hain. Payout ke liye aapko mandatory tasks poore karne HONGE: 1) Required ads dekhna (Rank ke mutabiq), 2) YouTube video dekhna (30s+), 3) Code verification wali video dekhna. Optional tasks jaise channels subscribe karna aapki profile behtar karte hain.

Aaj ke tasks ke liye Dashboard check karein. **Mandatory tasks** (jaise ads dekhna aur codes validate karna) withdrawal unlock karne ke liye zaroori hain. Optional tasks mein hamare YouTube, TikTok ya Instagram channels subscribe karna shamil hai.

Aap Mandatory Daily Tasks poore kiye bina payout request nahi kar sakte. Is mein aam tour par aapke Rank ke mutabiq ads dekhna (e.g., Worker = 75 ads) aur specific YouTube video par engagement verify karna shamil hai.

en:
Ranks are based on Total Referrals AND Total Earnings. Both must be met to upgrade:
1. **Useless**: New users (50 ads mandatory).
2. **Worker**: 10 Refs + 25k PKR (75 ads).
3. **Soldier**: 15 Refs + 35k PKR (100 ads).
4. **Captain**: 20 Refs + 50k PKR (125 ads).
5. **General**: 25 Refs + 100k PKR (150 ads).

{name}, your Rank determines your mandatory ad workload and status. Starting at 'Useless', you can rise to 'General' by inviting active users and earning more. For example, to become a 'Captain', you need 20 active referrals and 50,000 PKR total earnings.

Upgrading requires balance. You need BOTH a team (referrals) and personal performance (earnings). The higher your rank, the more mandatory ads you must watch daily: Useless (50) -> Worker (75) -> Soldier (100) -> Captain (125) -> General (150).
ur:
Ranks Total Referrals AUR Total Earnings donon par mabni hain. Upgrade ke liye donon poore hone chahiye:
1. **Useless**: Naye users (50 ads lazmi).
2. **Worker**: 10 Refs + 25k PKR (75 ads).
3. **Soldier**: 15 Refs + 35k PKR (100 ads).
4. **Captain**: 20 Refs + 50k PKR (125 ads).
5. **General**: 25 Refs + 100k PKR (150 ads).

{name}, aapka Rank aapke lazmi ad workload aur status ka tayyun karta hai. 'Useless' se shuru ho kar aap 'General' ban sakte hain. Misal ke tour par, 'Captain' banne ke liye 20 active referrals aur 50,000 PKR total earnings chahiye.

Upgrade ke liye balance zaroori hai. Aapko TEAM (referrals) aur PERSONAL PERFORMANCE (earnings) donon chahiye. Rank jitna ooncha, utne zyada ads rozana dekhne honge: Useless (50) -> Worker (75) -> Soldier (100) -> Captain (125) -> General (150).

en:
You can request withdrawals via **JazzCash**, **EasyPaisa**, or **Bank Transfer**. Go to the Payout section. 
**Rule**: You must complete all daily mandatory tasks to be eligible for a payout request today.
Ready to cash out? Ensure your Daily Tasks are done first! Then select JazzCash, EasyPaisa, or Bank Transfer in the Payout tab. We process payments to support the Pakistani community specifically.

Payouts are unlocked by performance. Complete your daily mandatory ads and verifications, then request your withdrawal to your preferred local account (JazzCash/EasyPaisa). Referral commissions will also be credited to your upline at this time.
ur:
Aap **JazzCash**, **EasyPaisa**, ya **Bank Transfer** ke zariye withdrawal request kar sakte hain. Payout section mein jayen. 
**Rule**: Aaj payout request ke liye aapko tamaam daily mandatory tasks poore karne honge.

Cash out ke liye tayyar? Pehle yakeeni banayein ke Daily Tasks ho chuke hain! Phir Payout tab mein JazzCash, EasyPaisa ya Bank Transfer chunein. Hum khaas Pakistani community ke liye payments process karte hain.

Payouts performance se unlock hote hain. Apne daily mandatory ads aur verifications poore karein, phir apne pasandida local account (JazzCash/EasyPaisa) mein withdrawal request karein. Is waqt aapke upline ko bhi referral commission milega.

en: **Warning**: Auto-functioning or using scripts to watch ads is strictly prohibited. The 'Auto-function' feature in our players is to simplify actions, NOT to replace attention. If you use it without actively paying attention, the earnings are considered **haram** and your account may be banned.

THORX requires active human attention. Enabling auto-features and walking away defeats the purpose and makes the income illegitimate (Haram). You must remain attentive while the system runs. We monitor for bot-like activity.
Do not use cheats or bots. Our objective is attention-based currency. Using auto-clickers without looking at the screen violates the Halal earning agreement. Keep it fair and honest!
ur: **Warning**: Auto-functioning ya scripts use karna sakhti se mana hai. Players mein 'Auto-function' feature sahulat ke liye hai, tawajjo hatane ke liye NAHI. Agar aap bina dihan diye isay use karein, to kamai **Haram** samjhi jayegi aur account ban ho sakta hai.

THORX ko active human tawajjo chahiye. Auto-features on kar ke chale jana maqsad khatam kar deta hai aur aamdani ko najaiz (Haram) banata hai. Jab system chale to aapko attentive rehna hoga. Hum bot-like activity monitor karte hain.
Cheats ya bots use na karein. Hamara maqsad attention-based currency hai. Bina screen dekhe auto-clickers use karna Halal earning agreement ki khilaf warzi hai. Imaandari rakhein!

en: I didn't quite catch that, {name}. Could you rephrase? I can help with Earning rules, Referrals, Ranks, or Payouts.
I'm not sure, but remember: THORX is about converting attention to currency. Ask me about 'How to earn' or 'Is this Halal'!
I can't answer that specifically, but our Support Team in the 'Area Contact' section can help with complex account issues.
ur: Maine sahi se samjha nahi, {name}. Kya aap dubara pooch sakte hain? Main Earning rules, Referrals, Ranks, ya Payouts mein madad kar sakta hoon.
Mujhe yakeen nahi, lekin yaad rakhein: THORX tawajjo ko paison mein badalne ka naam hai. Mujhse 'Kamana kaise hai' ya 'Kya ye Halal hai' ke baare mein poochein!
Main iska specific jawab nahi de sakta, lekin 'Area Contact' section mein hamari Support Team complex issues mein madad kar sakti hai.
